title: PSYC 231 Lecture 20 Prejudice, Stereotyping, and Discrimination Quiz

questions.prompt: Which belief is most consistent with just world beliefs?
options: People usually get what they deserve

questions.prompt: Which example best illustrates outgroup homogeneity effect?
options: Believing your own group members are diverse but another group is all the same
Preferring your own group over others
Competing with another group for resources
Changing beliefs to fit social norms

questions.prompt: A teacher expects certain students to perform poorly, interacts with them less, and those students end up performing worse. This is an example of:
Which situation best reflects stereotype threat?
options: A student performs worse on a test after being reminded of a negative stereotype about their group
A student is judged unfairly by a teacher

questions.prompt: Which is a cognitive source of prejudice discussed in lecture?
Which best describes social dominance orientation?
options: A desire for equality across groups
A tendency to help outgroup members
A belief that all groups should cooperate

questions.prompt: Which statement best reflects system justification theory?
options: People are motivated to challenge unfair systems
People prefer their ingroup over all others
People are motivated to justify and defend existing social systems
